name: Thriller
description: Crime, horror, and twist-ending stories with dark atmosphere and tension

character_blueprints.name: Det. Cross
character_blueprints.description: Weathered detective, tired eyes, five o'clock shadow, rumpled trench coat.
character_blueprints.prompt_template: Middle-aged detective, tired determined eyes, stubble, rumpled dark trench coat, serious expression

character_blueprints.name: Vera
character_blueprints.description: Enigmatic woman, dark hair, unreadable expression, elegant but unsettling.
character_blueprints.prompt_template: Mysterious woman in her 30s, dark hair, elegant dark clothing, unreadable expression, slightly unsettling

character_blueprints.name: Tom
character_blueprints.description: Nervous young man, fidgety, ordinary appearance, constantly looking over shoulder.
character_blueprints.prompt_template: Anxious young man in his late 20s, nervous expression, ordinary casual clothing, looking around nervously

scene_library.name: Dark Alley
scene_library.prompt: Narrow dark alley at night, wet ground reflecting dim street lights, fog, ominous shadows, gritty urban

scene_library.name: Abandoned Factory
scene_library.prompt: Abandoned industrial factory interior, broken windows, dust particles in light beams, decaying machinery

scene_library.name: Police Station
scene_library.prompt: Busy police station interior, fluorescent lighting, cluttered desks, interrogation room visible, tense atmosphere

scene_library.name: Dim Apartment
scene_library.prompt: Dimly lit apartment room, single desk lamp, shadows on walls, cluttered evidence board, noir atmosphere

color_grade.name: Noir Dark
color_grade.description: Low saturation dark tones with heavy shadows

shot_rhythm.style_notes: Jump cuts for shock, POV shots for tension, voyeuristic angles, slow reveals

prompt_templates.en: Cinematic thriller shot, {character} in {scene}, {action}, dark moody lighting, desaturated tones, high contrast shadows, noir atmosphere, 4K quality
prompt_templates.zh: 惊悚电影镜头，{character}在{scene}中，{action}，暗调光影，低饱和色调，高对比阴影，黑色电影氛围，4K画质
